detectors.description:
Reentrancy in JankenmanInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (JankenmanInu.sol#681-813):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (JankenmanInu.sol#753)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (JankenmanInu.sol#827-839)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (JankenmanInu.sol#759)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (JankenmanInu.sol#847)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (JankenmanInu.sol#849)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (JankenmanInu.sol#811)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (JankenmanInu.sol#977)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (JankenmanInu.sol#957)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (JankenmanInu.sol#959)
	JankenmanInu._rOwned (JankenmanInu.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- JankenmanInu._takeTeam(uint256) (JankenmanInu.sol#971-979)
	- JankenmanInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (JankenmanInu.sol#931-967)
	- JankenmanInu.balanceOf(address) (JankenmanInu.sol#507-511)
	- JankenmanInu.constructor() (JankenmanInu.sol#441-471)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (JankenmanInu.sol#811)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (JankenmanInu.sol#985)
	JankenmanInu._rTotal (JankenmanInu.sol#355) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- JankenmanInu._getCurrentSupply() (JankenmanInu.sol#1135-1147)
	- JankenmanInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (JankenmanInu.sol#983-989)
	- JankenmanInu.constructor() (JankenmanInu.sol#441-471)
	- JankenmanInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (JankenmanInu.sol#603-625)
